emails.subject: Re: 3/06/ Checkout
emails.body: Re: 3/06/ Checkout Evelyn, I'm so sorry I haven't found these deals yet! I've left messages with Mike Swerzbin and Matt Motley, but I don't see these trades in either of their logs or even in the short term trade logs. One of those guys should be back in the office momentarily, and I'll let you know when I've talked to them. Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 03/06/2001 03:15 PM

emails.subject: 3/06/ Checkout
emails.body: 3/06/ Checkout Amerex West All deals checked out fine. Bloomberg All deals checked out fine. Prebon Mike Swerbin I am missing the following deals: Enron buys from PGET 25 mw of May PV at $272 Enron sells to EES 25 mw of May PV at $268.
